mano_cua.result_summary: 单点渲染正常但发现严重Bug：mouse_move无按键按下时被错误捕获为绘画轨迹，产生非预期线条。线条起始端平切无圆润端头（重复坐标点导致算法无法计算方向）。另有撤销/删除对单点笔画无效的问题
mano_cua.last_reasoning: mouse_move without button press triggers drawing strokes (severe). Line start points show flat cut instead of tapered round ends when duplicate coordinates exist. Undo/delete doesn't work on single-point strokes. Single click produces normal round dot.
